title: EurekaCraft
description:
This mod adds flying "Ref Boards" which can be crafted once you discover Blueprints in any of the abandoned shacks that now spawn in the world.

Inspired by concepts from the anime Eureka Seven and the hang glider from OpenBlocks.
body:
This mod adds "Ref Boards" which can be crafted once you discover Blueprints in any of the abandoned shacks that now spawn in the world.

Ref Boards glide through the air.  But if you encounter a "TRAPAR" cloud or storm, your board will achieve lift and fly!

You can only see these clouds/storms if you have equipped Scub Goggles.

More description will come soon.  In-game guidebooks will also be added.

For now, you can rely on JustEnoughItems and make your way through the advancement tree that this mod provides.

This mod was inspired by objects from the anime series Eureka Seven and the hang glider from OpenBlocks.
